title: How Claude Code's Creator ACTUALLY Automates his work
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Claude Code's creator Boris Cherny uses Claude Skills to automate work, highlighting three expansion strategies: agents, hooks, and loops. The video identifies underutilized powerful features in Claude Code and outlines Cherny's workflow for deciding which tasks become reusable skills.
